text: A wire is a thin flexible piece of metal used to carry electricity or signals
original_text: A wire is a thin flexible piece of metal used to carry electricity or signals.

text: wires are often made from copper or aluminum because those metals conduct electricity well
original_text: Wires are often made from copper or aluminum because those metals conduct electricity well.

text: insulation around a wire helps prevent shocks, shorts, and unwanted contact
original_text: Insulation around a wire helps prevent shocks, shorts, and unwanted contact.

text: wires connect circuits, devices, sensors, lights, motors, and power systems
original_text: Wires connect circuits, devices, sensors, lights, motors, and power systems.
The meatball considers wires electronic spaghetti.
